name: DeepSeek-R1-Zero
tagline: RL-only variant trained without supervised fine-tuning, demonstrating emergent reasoning.
metaDescription: DeepSeek-R1-Zero (DeepSeek), released 2025-01-20 — part of the DeepSeek R1 line. RL-only variant trained without supervised fine-tuning, demonstrating emergent…
overview: DeepSeek-R1-Zero is a large language model from DeepSeek, part of the DeepSeek R1 line. Released 2025-01-20. First-generation reasoning line built on the V3 backbone with large-scale reinforcement learning, exposing chain-of-thought; open-weight under MIT.
What's notable in this version: RL-only variant trained without supervised fine-tuning, demonstrating emergent reasoning.
